title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 355.741 - Decree of dissolution
text:
355.741.  Decree of dissolution. — 1.  If after a hearing the court determines that one or more grounds for judicial dissolution described in section 355.726 exist, it may enter a decree dissolving the corporation and specifying the effective date of the dissolution, and the clerk of the court shall deliver a certified copy of the decree to the secretary of state, who shall file it.
  2.  After entering the decree of dissolution, the court shall direct the winding up and liquidation of the corporation's affairs in accordance with section 355.691 and the notification of its claimants in accordance with sections 355.696 and 355.701.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1095) 
Effective 7-01-95
